programme.desc: Host Steven Bull cruises into Orillia, Ontario, via the Trent-Severn Waterway, in time for their legendary pirate party and musket battle.

programme.title: Sportsman’s Adventures: Sailin’ Into Key Largo, Florida
programme.desc: Captain Rick Murphy fishes the high seas of Key Largo for sailfish and tuna. Joining him on the Murphy’s Law Contender is Brie Gabrielle and Captain Jon Cooper.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep126: Season Recap: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour
programme.desc: Hot Water reviews what's been a very exciting season of F1H2O Powerboat World Championship racing.

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Minisodes - Canyoning, Jet Ski Free Ride, and Feeding Stingrays
programme.desc: The Deap Canyoning Team defies logic as they leap from high cliffs into deep canyon pools. This realatively new extreme sport called Canyoning, is breathtaking and spectacular viewing!

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep804: Paddling Bon Echo Provincial Park The Thousand Islands in Ontario, Canada
programme.desc: Host Ken Whiting sets out by sea kayak to explore Bon Echo Provincial Park and the Thousand Islands in Ontario, Canada.

programme.title: Travel Quest Ep210: Islands of Palau Guam
programme.desc: Exploring the islands of Palau and Guam includes a submarine view of the ocean wildlife, exploration of the battles of World War II, learning the culture of the locals and snorkeling among thousands of jellyfish. These islands have it all, including one of the most interesting foods Host Bill Ball has ever eaten—fruit bat.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep212: Orillia, Ontario – Canada: The Trent-Severn Waterway’s Best-Kept Secret
programme.desc: Host Steven Bull cruises into Orillia, Ontario, via the Trent-Severn Waterway, in time for their legendary pirate party and musket battle.

programme.title: Sportsman’s Adventures: Sailin’ Into Key Largo, Florida
programme.desc: Captain Rick Murphy fishes the high seas of Key Largo for sailfish and tuna. Joining him on the Murphy’s Law Contender is Brie Gabrielle and Captain Jon Cooper.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep126: Season Recap: F1H2O Powerboat World Championship Tour
programme.desc: Hot Water reviews what's been a very exciting season of F1H2O Powerboat World Championship racing.

programme.title: Unraveling - Chris Benchetler
programme.desc: Progression means something different to everyone. To Chris Benchetler, progression means evolving as a professional skier, as an artist, and as a father. It means growth, unraveling expectations, and changes over time. It means simplicity, clarity, and freedom. Filmed by director Tyler Hamlet.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 9: Kristoffer Turdell
programme.desc: In Episode 9, we encounter skier Kristoffer Turdell, two-time champion of the freeride world. Join us for this special Black Crows documentary about the animal from Gallivare, Sweden. Directed by Nikolai Schirmer.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 10: Beau Fredlund
programme.desc: A yurt, 140 inhabitants in town, a door that opens on the northeast of Yellowstone National Park in Montana, a fireplace, a pair of skis, welcome to Beau's wild garden. a film by Nikolai Schirmer

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 11: The Jackson 9
programme.desc: Jackson Hole, Wyoming is home to some of the most epic skiing in North America. It is also home to a bunch of bohemian skiers nicknamed the Jackson 9. In Episode 11, we kick off Part One of our documentary series dedicated to these hobo shredders and beautiful souls. Directed by Nicolai Schirmer.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 12: Nikolai Schirmer
programme.desc: He is tall, handsome, smart, sensitive and on fire while on skis. Nikolai Schirmer, skier, bohemian-movie-maker, reveals himself in this black doc where his meandering path unfolds. An itinerary full of waves and mountains where we discover a man whose heart has progressively tuned in to the rhythm of nature.

programme.title: Snowflake
programme.desc: Witness the joys and wonders of nature through the eyes of Snowflake, an eccentric Swiss skier with a life philosophy just as beautiful and perfectly unique as his namesake.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: Motherload
programme.desc: The hardest part of any adventure is getting out the door. Planning is tedious. Packing is time consuming. Once on-hill, everything falls into place. Follow pro skiers Izzy Lynch and Tessa Treadway as they carry the load of life changing events and the love of their children into the mountains.

programme.title: The Ghost Ski Resorts - Fortress
programme.desc: Deep in the Rockies stands Fortress Mountain. From the late 1960s through the 1980s, this landmark ski area buzzed with activity. Today, it is a quiet thing of abandoned beauty. Skiers Mark Abma and Callum Pettit explore the past and ponder the future of this once iconic Alberta destination.

programme.title: The Ghost Ski Resorts - Ski Rio
programme.desc: In January 2000, Ski Rio closed one night. The resort has remained dormant ever since. It’s no stretch to compare Ski Rio’s snow covered lodgings to the Overlook Hotel in the cult classic thriller The Shining. Just like in the film, the innkeeper Joe Musich admits his job can get a little spooky.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 13: The Groomer Crow - Bernie Rosow
programme.desc: Do you despise your office job? If so, Episode 13 offers the truth, the way, and the light. Bernie Rosow could neither consider a life without skiing, nor skiing without the freedom of skiing. Now a snowcat operator, his night shift allows him to solve the equation and to freeski every day, freely.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 14: Tony Deano - Ski Bums Forever
programme.desc: In Episode 14, we honor our friends Tony Stadler and Deano Dacas. Before Black Crows was ever conceived, we were skiing for years with these two. And we will keep on skiing with them, whatever happens. We are the ski bum crows brotherhood forever.

programme.title: The Black Crows - Episode 15: Gabriella Palko
programme.desc: Gabby Palko is living what many skiers would call a dream life. From her sailboat in the Port of Valdez, she is able to ski the Alaskan mountains as often as she likes. In this emotional documentary, she connects the dots between the two parts of her life, broken by the long illness of her father.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: Wavy 2
programme.desc: After filming WAVY, director Nikolai Schirmer promised himself that he would never set foot on a ship again. Find out how he ended up off the coast of Svalbard with an excited rookie, a contemptuous captain, and a reformed drug addict, in this thrilling and often comical ski adventure documentary.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: La Sentinelle - The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Bruno Compagnet and Camille Jaccoux are friends and co-founders of Black Crows, the iconic ski brand, and La Sentinelle, the renown ski touring event. Two passionate practitioners in conversation, always seeking the wild, beautiful, and natural side of the mountain.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 1 - LAAX
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with Absinthe Films and the legendary professional snowboarders Nicolas Müller and Wolfgang Nyvelt as they score epic powder at Laax Resort in Switzerland. Nicolas shows the crew around his home terrain, hitting up big hits and dreamy powder fields.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 2 - LAAX
programme.desc: In episode 2 of the Absinthe Films Flipside series, Nicolas Müller and Wolfgang Nyvelt continue exploring Nicolas’ backyard, the Laax Resort in Switzerland. With snow this deep, the mountain is an endless playground.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 3 - LAAX
programme.desc: Snowboarders always have secret stashes. This is especially true for Nicolas Müller. Watch as the Laax local takes Wolle Nyvelt to his favorite spots on the mountain. If you like perfect jumps high above the clouds, powder landings, frontside 1080s, and beautiful sunsets, this episode is for you.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 4 - ARLBERG
programme.desc: In 2012, snowboarder Danny Kass captured his debut part with Absinthe Films. To begin, Kass met up with Eric Jackson in Gigi Rüf’s hometown of Arlberg, Austria. While there, a war broke out between the film crew and the locals. Watch as Gigi steps in to keep the peace.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 5 - ARLBERG
programme.desc: Danny Kass, Gigi Rüf, and Wolle Nyvelt meet up in Arlberg, Austria. The crew spends the day fine-tuning their jump and bagging a perfect bluebird session. Danny puts down his first 720 of the year. Gigi takes a heavy slam trying backside double corks. But wait, there’s more! Drama ensues!

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 7 - SAAS FEE
programme.desc: The superhuman Danny Kass and legendary Nicolas Müller reunite with the Absinthe Films crew in Switzerland. From the word “GO!,” the guys score epic powder conditions. Nico goes off slashing. Danny locks down the biggest backflip of his life.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 8 - SAAS FEE
programme.desc: In this episode of Flipside, Danny Kass flips a coin in Saas Fee. Tails he stays in Switzerland. Heads he goes home. Switzerland it is! Now on a solo mission, Kass stacks clips for the cameras of Absinthe Films director Patrick Armbruster. This is Danny Kass at his best.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Resonance
programme.desc: Resonance stands as a defining Absinthe Films classic, shot across Japan, Switzerland, and Alaska. Featuring Gigi Rüf, Nicolas Müller, Lucas Debari, Danny Kass, Annie Boulanger, Scotty Lago, Bode Merrill, and more in peak form.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Even in the world of super sports cars people get goose bumps if they hear the name Lamborghini. Wherever they’re spotted, the Huracan and the Aventador always receive lots of attention.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: In 2014, Mercedes-Benz presented their first Plug-in Hybrid, the S500. When it comes to Bentley, a V8 engine means down-sizing. We took a look at the brand's Flying Spur model with a smaller engine. And: the 6th generation Maserati Quattroporte.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its Macan Turbo, Porsche sets the benchmark in the SUV segment. The optional performance package increases the output from 400 to 440 HP. A serious competitor bears the Maserati brand. With the Levante, die Italian carmaker wants to stir up the competitive market for sporty SUVs.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Swiss tuning company O.CT turned the Lamborghini Huracan into an even more furious beast. Also: the Cadillac CTS-V looks like a regular limousine, but at a second glance it reveals its monstrous power.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: After its introduction the Audi RS6 was the benchmark when it came to extreme estate cars. Its performance was already very impressive, but according to the Audi tuners that still wasn't enough.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Since its establishment in 1919, Bentley consistently drew attention thanks to their ongoing success in motor sports. The limited edition Continental GT3-R was one of the iconic manufacturer's sportiest cars ever.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The BMW M3 and the Mercedes-AMG C63, the top models of the two iconic manufacturers, are in eternal competition. With the Lexus RC F, a competitor from Japan is lurking. Is the Japanese exotic a threat to the German competition?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tushek TS600, a limited edition super sports car had a power/weight ratio that is on the level of GT3 racing cars. The Bentley Continental GT3-R special edition was also limited whereas McLaren offered their 570S to all customers.

programme.title: Escape to Zanzibar - Episode 2
programme.desc: We begin this day of discoveries with a visit to the most important historical landmarks in Stone Town. For lunch, we head straight on to The Rock: one of Zanzibar's greatest icons. The restaurant was literally built on a rock and can only be reached on foot during the low tide. Then, we will follow Shabed's suggestion and dive into the water to try all the activities available.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Surf Series: South Africa - Episode 2 - Port Alfred Classic
programme.desc: Welcome to the second event of the South Africa WQS Surf Series. This time, we are in Port Alfred at The Royal St Andrews Hotel Port Alfred Classic. Some of South Africa's best waves can be surfed here despite also being one of the most underrated locations. We are in for a thrill!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 3
programme.desc: The third event of the GC32 Racing Tour is taking place in Villasimius, in Italy. Taking place in mid-September on Sardinia's southeastern point, the GC32 Racing Tour has worked hard with the authorities to plant here one of the most important international competitions in foiling racing. Will Allinghi continue their winning streak in Italian waters?Find out the best moments of the competition of the GC32 Villasimius World Championship.

programme.title: Almost Invisible

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S06:E13 - Countdown the Best Hunts

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E01 - Manny Goes Medieval
programme.desc: Manny demonstrates his medieval skills, taking a huge wild boar with Viking-style spears.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E02 - Drought and Danger
programme.desc: Manny investigates how severe drought has caused wildlife to congregate near any water.

programme.title: Savage Wild - S04:E03 - Black Bear Explosion
programme.desc: Manny explores a Florida swamp swarming with black bears.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E01 - American Icons

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E02 - Big Move

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E03 - Bear In Focus

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E04 - Aggressive Measures
programme.desc: Ivan goes to Mozambique to join an anti-poaching team that focuses on catching poachers and protecting at-risk animals.

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S06:E10 - Mountain Lion

programme.title: Sasquatch Mountain Man - S06:E11 - Alaska Deer Part 2

programme.title: Frontalwatte
programme.desc: Frontalwatte is like running against a wall and falling softly. Franz, Adrian and Anastasia stumble through a world without consequences.

programme.title: Family Fever

programme.title: Away You Go

programme.title: Solomon's Stone

programme.title: 1st Bite

Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Hell's Angels

programme.title: Win Before You Begin

programme.title: Arresting Anxiousness

programme.title: SO BE IT Episode 6
programme.desc: Official live videos from the album SO BE IT by Elevation Worship.

programme.title: Hand Him The Plan
programme.desc: Sometimes the battle in your mind is proof that God’s trying to do something great in your heart. What you see isn’t the full picture of what God has for you. When you hand God your plans, you make room for His purpose.

programme.title: The Prayer That Repairs
programme.desc: Don’t be so confused about the noise around you that you can’t hear the God who made you. When you’re faced with a struggle you didn’t see coming, remember that Jesus is already praying for you, and His prayer is stronger than any attack.

programme.title: Move It To The Middle
programme.desc: Stressed, insecure, and stuck — that’s how Moses felt, too. But that wasn’t the end of his story, and it’s not yours, either. It’s just the middle. There’s hope past this chapter, and it’s found by shifting your focus back to God.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: At nightfall, commissioner DAZA tries to arrest Clara Inés for identity theft, Nicolás defends him.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Octavia promises Clara Inés that she will prove her innocence and an authentic Santa María; Clara is no longer interested in proving that she belongs to the family.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: César Román wishes happiness to the newlyweds, but Santiago - the discordant note - toasts to a happiness that lasts until Salvatore Perroni destroys them in court.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: César Román has his cooking show, but in panic during the first broadcast, Mamá Juana surprises everyone by taking over the show.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max is arrested and Camila assures that he is innocent. Santiago tells the inspector that he saw Max cleaning the object with which Ezequiel was killed and, sadly, he concludes that he and Camila were the perpetrators. The interrogations continue.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Torrealba exposes before two officers the case of the crime of Ezequiel Lopez Mendez, he is interrupted by Marcelina who comes to confess her guilt, Torrealba does not believe her. Rosa accuses Octavia of being the one who thought of abandoning Camila and convinced Marcelina to do so. Octavia mocks her and Camila, blind with anger, throws her out of her house.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Refusing to accept Victoria's decision to stay away from him now that he will be the father of the child that Florencia is expecting, Nicolás tries to convince his beloved to trust that it is possible to be together. Florencia shows up at Victoria's house to find out if she is capable of staying together with Nicolás in spite of her condition; once Nicolás arrives, Florencia stands up for her love for the father of her child.Faced with the discouragement that overwhelms Victoria, Hilario unburdens himself with Adelaida, as he fears he cannot protect his daughter from the suffering caused by the news of Florencia's pregnancy;

programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto contrata a Antón, un delincuente, para asesinar a Rosa Blanco; Camila y Max, felices, cuentan al Padre Tiziano, sobre su próxima boda. Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila explica a Ezequiel y Julia el motivo de su felicidad: se casará con Max, y también pronto se reunirá con su madre. Por medio de Luciano, Rosa le envía la dirección donde van a encontrarse, pero Elda, rabiosa, copia los datos y los revela al Inspector Torrealba que ordena un operativo policial para detenerla.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila divisa una mujer que corresponde a la descripción de su mamá. Antón, el sicario, también está allí y armado se dirige a ellas. Torrealba ordena a sus hombres correr hacia las mujeres, agarran a Camila y se llevan a la mujer.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosa Blanco hace una llamada a Fausto e inquieta a Ezequiel con amenazas contra él, Octavia y toda su familia. Camila escucha por primera vez la voz de su madre pero ella le comunica que la llama sólo para despedirse, ya que la quieren matar. Camila recibe un cuaderno que le envía Rosa.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Sólo Camila debe conocer el contenido de lo escrito en el cuaderno. Su ira y rabia va creciendo y piensa que su mamá tiene el derecho de vengarse. Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: El dolor, el odio y el resentimiento anidan en Camila por las verdades que ha descubierto. Camila, muy hermosa, lista para casarse, pide hablar con la Madre Isabel para preguntarle porqué la engaño durante tantos años. En su dolor, Camila le dice a Max que no puede casarse con él.

programme.title: Vecinos del Terror
programme.desc: Por accidente se les dispara un arma con el impacto matan al cuñado quien después regresa de ultratumba a cobrar venganza y ni la policía se escapa de la venganza de ultratumba

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte
programme.desc: Una serie de extraños asesinatos están ocurriendo en la ciudad. Una investigadora de lo paranormal y un detective privado se dedican a indagar en el caso y lo que encontraran será algo que nunca imaginaron.

programme.title: Expediente 53 2.0
programme.desc: Mientras el líder de los delincuentes de la ciudad, Jack se reúne con el demonio Lilly alias Abal en un antro/table para matar y tomar las almas de sus víctimas. El FBI pide ayuda de unos sacerdotes solo que el hermano menor de Jack es poseído por Abal y ahora Jack tendrá que tomar una de las decisiones más difíciles de su vida.

programme.title: Buenas Noches, Dijo La Señorita Pájaro
programme.desc: Un adulterio, un secreto familiar, un asesino en serie. Una historia fabricada con estructura de muñecas rusas y con ritmo de montañas rusas.

programme.title: Eros Una Vez María
programme.desc: María es el gran amor de Tonatiuh, pero él la pierde. Intenta mantener su esencia, buscando incansablemente en cada mujer que conoce, tratando de obtener tantas experiencias sobre ellas como pueda, para poder encontrar algo que le recuerde a su amor perdido. Todas esas mujeres tienen una particularidad: se llaman María.

programme.title: El Hormigón
programme.desc: El hormigón es un superhéroe que está harto de la mafia de su ciudad y decide combatirla con ayuda del Karate y la salsa.

programme.title: Abolición De La Propiedad
programme.desc: En un sótano oscuro, Norma escucha su voz y la de Everio en una vieja grabadora Ampex. Cada que él vuelve a bajar, la detiene. Han estado platicándose sus vidas, varias veces las conversaciones grabadas terminan coincidiendo con las charlas que ellos sostienen. Lo que le preocupa a Norma es que hasta ese día no conocía a Everio y lo último que escuchó fue que él la ahorcaba.

programme.title: El Deseo de Domingo
programme.desc: Narra la historia de Domingo, un adulto mayor que sufre Alzheimer y pasa sus días en un geriátrico en la ciudad de Viedma, desde donde intenta, a toda costa, viajar a la Capital, a San Isidro, a ver el gran premio de turf Carlos Pellegrini. Pero claro, no se trata de cualquier premio, sino el del año 1952. Para eso necesitará de la ayuda de Marcelo, su nieto, quien se encuentra en el dilema de conformarse con su puesto en una dependencia pública o seguir luchando por triunfar con su banda de rock. …

programme.title: Eros Una Vez María
programme.desc: María es el gran amor de Tonatiuh, pero él la pierde. Intenta mantener su esencia, buscando incansablemente en cada mujer que conoce, tratando de obtener tantas experiencias sobre ellas como pueda, para poder encontrar algo que le recuerde a su amor perdido. programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
